code: import{apiClient,withCollectionAlias}from"./apiClient";export async function getAllActivityLogs(){const response=await apiClient.get("/activity-logs/all");return withCollectionAlias(response.data,"activityLogs");}export async function getActivityLogs(){let params=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:{};const response=await apiClient.get("/activity-logs",{params});return withCollectionAlias(response.data,"activityLogs");}
